'''Joz Larutur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the husband of [[Cira Larutur]] and one of the hostages that were taken during the [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Joz and Cira were on their way to see their first grandchild when they were taken hostage by [[Nuriin-Ar]] for the immediate withdrawal of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. As [[Kal Skirata]], along with mercenaries and a Special Security Officer of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] arrived and freed the hostages.
